# MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ValidationData.none

**Case**

An empty validation dataset you use to skip model validation.

## Declaration

```swift
case none
```

## Designating validation data

- **MLStyleTransfer.ModelParameters.ValidationData.content(_:)**: The location of a validation image you use to validate the model.

items.description: The location of a validation image you use to validate the model.
